text: Identify the next figure in the series.
explanation: Pattern: The black dot moves clockwise around the corners of the square. Step 1: Top-Left. Step 2: Top-Right. Step 3: Bottom-Right. Step 4 (Next): Bottom-Left. Diagram A shows the dot in the Bottom-Left corner.

text: Which figure replaces the question mark?
explanation: Pattern: The number of vertical lines increases by 1 in each step. Step 1: 1 line. Step 2: 2 lines. Step 3: 3 lines. Next should have 4 lines. Diagram C has 4 vertical lines.

Analogy Logic: Shape changes from Circle to Square, but the internal symbol remains the same. Pair 1: Circle with '+' -> Square with '+'. Pair 2: Circle with 'x' -> ? Rule: Must be a Square with 'x'. Diagram B shows this.

text: Find the correct mirror image if the mirror is placed to the right.
explanation: Mirror Logic: Left becomes Right. The original arrow points Top-Left. The mirror image must point Top-Right. Diagram D matches this reflection.

text: A paper is folded in half (left to right) and a hole is punched in the center. How will it look when unfolded?
explanation: Folding Logic: The paper is folded once vertically. A hole in the center of the folded half implies two holes equidistant from the fold line when opened. Diagram A shows two horizontally aligned holes.
